full_text:
Niu Fu 牛輔
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Niu Fu (牛輔). Fought against Lü Bu and Li Su, after Dong Zhuo’s death. Killed by Hu Che’er. Niu Fu was affiliated with Dong Zhuo. Niu Fu lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
